framework.name: Tulip OPC-UA Native Architecture
framework.description: Tulip uses OPC-UA as its primary machine data ingestion protocol and stores all timestamps in UTC. This implies data structures aligned with an open industrial standard rather than a fully proprietary schema.
framework.raw_quote: By simply setting up an OPC UA Connector and connecting your OPC UA fields to attributes in Tulip, you can begin tracking and analyzing data.
